user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Consolidated Messenger. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-19 11:05 EST
Subject: URGENT: account health Issue at Consolidated Messenger

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with account health. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-07 14:30 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Consolidated Messenger account health

Our team encountered some challenges with account health. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 11:35 EST
Subject: Re: Re: account health Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: account health Discussion - Consolidated Messenger
Date: 2024-01-10
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into account health.

[00:08:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:11:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around resource allocation.

[00:13:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:16:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:20:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:23:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:28:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:30:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:32:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.
